app.title: LCDLLN
language.first_run.title: Language selection
language.first_run.message: We detected {language}. Confirm your language before login.
language.first_run.confirm: Press Enter to confirm and continue to authentication.
language.options.title: Options
options.menu.hint_root: Enter opens section  arrows or wheel
options.menu.hint_submenu: Left/Right adjust  Escape or Back for menu
options.video.title: Video
options.audio.title: Audio
options.controls.title: Controls
options.game.title: Game
auth.title_line1: The Chronicles of the Black Moon
auth.tooltip.birth_day: Scroll the wheel or use Up/Down while focused. Day 1–31 (calendar check on submit).
auth.error.enter_register_fields: Enter login, password, password confirmation, email, first name, last name, and birth date.
auth.error.password_mismatch: The two passwords do not match.
auth.error.invalid_birth_date: Birth date must use valid numeric day/month/year values.
auth.error.enter_verify_code: Enter the verification code from the email.
auth.error.invalid_verify_code: Verification code must contain exactly 6 digits.
auth.error.enter_recovery_email: Enter the email address for password recovery.
auth.error.accept_terms: Scroll to the end of the terms, then check the acknowledgement box.
auth.error.invalid_character_name: Character name must be 3-32 characters and use only letters, digits, or underscore.
auth.error.open_recovery_portal: Unable to open the password recovery portal.
auth.error.character_session_inactive: Character creation session is not active.
auth.info.register_ok: Registration OK. Enter the verification code sent by email.
auth.info.email_verified: Email verified. You can now log in.
auth.info.forgot_password: If the email exists, a reset message has been sent.
auth.info.terms_done: All terms accepted. Choose your character name.
auth.info.character_cancelled: Character creation cancelled. Back to login.
auth.hint.character.rules: 3 to 32 characters. Letters, digits, and underscore.
auth.panel.title: Title
auth.status.unavailable: Servers under maintenance. Please try again in a moment.
auth.status.network_error: Cannot reach the status server (network, firewall, or URL). Check the address, port 3842, and that the master is running.
auth.tooltip.login: Your unique login to connect to the game. 3 to 32 characters, letters and digits only.
auth.tooltip.password: Your password. Minimum 8 characters, at least one letter and one digit (server policy).
auth.tooltip.password_confirm: Enter the same password again to avoid typos.
auth.tooltip.email: Valid email address for account verification and password recovery.
auth.tooltip.first_name: Your first name as it will appear on your player profile.
auth.tooltip.last_name: Your last name for account identification.
auth.tooltip.birth_day: Birth day (1-31). Select with left/right arrows.
auth.tooltip.birth_month: Birth month (1-12). Select with left/right arrows.
auth.tooltip.birth_year: Birth year (e.g. 1990). Select with left/right arrows.
